message:
feat(test): expand proptest coverage for session_dna, continuous_backpressure, command_guard

Add strategies and tests for uncovered serde types:
- session_dna: StoredSession, KnnPrediction strategies + PcaModel extras (30→39)
- continuous_backpressure: ThrottleActions, BackpressureSnapshot strategies (30→37)
- command_guard: GuardDecision, AuditEntry, PaneGuardConfig, GuardPolicy strategies (30→38)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
